---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for RepoEngineer
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

# 🚀 Feature Request

## Summary

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem?

Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

Example:

> "I'm always frustrated when..."

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail.

Include:

- What should be added?
- How should it work?
- What is the expected outcome?

---

## Use Case

Explain the real-world scenario where this feature would be useful.

Example:

- AI Agent
- Repository Analysis
- Code Generation
- Pull Request Automation
- GitHub Integration
- LangGraph Workflow
- Multi-Agent Collaboration
- Memory
- Context Retrieval

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

---

## Additional Context

Provide any relevant links, diagrams, screenshots, research, or references.

---

## Would You Like to Implement It?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this feature.
- [ ] I'd like guidance before implementing it.
- [ ] No, I'm only suggesting the idea.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] This feature has not already been proposed.
- [ ] I believe this feature aligns with the goals of RepoEngineer.
- [ ] I am willing to discuss implementation details if needed.
